name: media-compressor
title: Media Compressor
description: A business composition over mediabunny's Conversion: load an audio or video file, pick a quality preset and (for video) a target resolution, then re-encode to a smaller MP4 — video as H.264 + AAC, audio-only as AAC. A before/after readout shows the original size, the compressed size, and the percentage saved; the result auto-downloads.
